scripts.format: prettier --write index.html style.css README.md package.json eslint.config.mjs scripts/**/*.mjs test/**/*.mjs && prettier --write --parser babel app.js.tpl
scripts.format:check: prettier --check index.html style.css README.md package.json eslint.config.mjs scripts/**/*.mjs test/**/*.mjs && prettier --check --parser babel app.js.tpl
